_comment: QTR Klik Klaker Configuration File - Stores application preferences and settings
_version_comment: Config file format version - Do not modify manually

ui_preferences._comment: User interface preferences - Safe to modify these values
ui_preferences._show_welcome_message_comment: Show welcome dialog on startup - Options: true (show) or false (don't show)
ui_preferences._rating_system_comment: Rating system to use - Options: '1-5' (Standard) or '1-9' (Extended). Change via Data Management > Rating System menu
ui_preferences._auto_tree_sync_comment: Automatically sync matchups when updates occur - Options: true (on) or false (off)
ui_preferences._tree_autogen_enabled_comment: Auto-generate tree after grid loads. Requires restart. Options: true (on) or false (off)
ui_preferences._matchup_output_format_comment: Matchup extraction display format - Options: 'standard' (concise summary) or 'verbose' (detailed decision path)

logging._comment: Logging preferences - Controls debug output and log files
logging._level_comment: Logging detail level - Options: 'verbose' (detailed) or 'normal' (basic). Currently used by database operations
logging._enabled_comment: Enable/disable logging - Options: true (on) or false (off)

_created_comment: Initial config creation timestamp - Do not modify manually
_last_modified_comment: Last config update timestamp - Updated automatically when any setting changes
